summary: Iteration 9 testing completed successfully. All new features verified: POST /api/leads creates manual leads with source='manual' and status='raw', business_name validation returns 400 for empty values, queued_for_sequence status auto-creates 'Secuencia - Leads en cola' email list, Frontend 'Crear Lead' button and dialog work correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/leads creates manual lead with source='manual' and status='raw'
POST /api/leads returns 400 when business_name is empty
POST /api/leads returns 400 when business_name is whitespace only
POST /api/leads returns 400 when business_name field is missing
PUT /api/leads/{id}/status with queued_for_sequence creates 'Secuencia - Leads en cola' email list
PUT /api/leads/{id}/status with queued_for_sequence adds lead to existing list without duplicates
Frontend 'Crear Lead' button visible on Leads page
Frontend 'Crear Lead' dialog opens with form fields (Empresa, Email, Telefono, Ciudad, Categoria, Website, Notas)
Frontend lead creation submits successfully and shows 'Lead creado' toast
Frontend dialog closes after successful lead creation
Sidebar shows 4 sections: SPECTRA PROSPECCION, LEADS, SPECTRA EMAIL MARKETING, SPECTRA CRM
Sidebar shows SUPER ADMIN section for super_admin role
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ManualLead_*, TEST_SeqLead_* leads for testing via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features all working: 1) POST /api/leads creates manual leads with source='manual' and status='raw', requires business_name (returns 400 if empty/whitespace/missing), 2) PUT /api/leads/{id}/status with queued_for_sequence auto-creates/updates 'Secuencia - Leads en cola' email list and adds lead without duplicates, 3) Frontend 'Crear Lead' button on Leads page opens dialog with form fields, creates lead and shows success toast, 4) Sidebar still shows 4 sections correctly with SUPER ADMIN for super_admin role

manual_lead_creation.validation: Returns 400 if business_name is empty, whitespace, or missing

queued_for_sequence_email_list.feature: Auto-create email list when lead queued for sequence
queued_for_sequence_email_list.behavior: Creates list if not exists, adds lead to existing list without duplicates

frontend_create_lead_dialog.feature: Create Lead button and dialog on Leads page
